## Checklist

- [ ] `cd go && go vet ./... && go build ./... && go test ./... -count=1` passes
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal config committed
- [ ] Changes to `.github/`, release config, `server.json`, `go.mod`, or `vault/`/`oauth/`
      are intentional (these require code-owner review)
